decisions.audit_log: DEDICATED audit_log table (action-centric: actor/action/target/reason/before-after), NOT extending entity-centric activity_log
decisions.health: DEDICATED health channel (integrator POSTs heartbeat -> PM tracks last_seen + train.integrator_unhealthy on stale), NOT lane-lock-heartbeat-derived (blind when idle)
decisions.overrides: ALL 5 break-glass: pause/resume/force-release-lock/force-land(R1 override, skip verify, admin+reason)/force-reject. force-land/force-reject admin-only + reason-required + audited
decisions.dashboard: FULL vision: queue/in-flight/heartbeat/p50-p95-p99 time-to-land/verify-success/abandon rates/pool-util/per-request-timeline/SLO compliance
decisions.sequencing: backend-first (audit->health->overrides->metrics->timeline/SLO->webhooks->shared/api-types) THEN web UI THEN integrator (heartbeat+pause) THEN E2E
decisions.webhooks: webhooks.ts is INBOUND-only (no outbound delivery to reuse). RULING: BOTH SSE/dashboard banners AND a minimal NEW outbound Discord webhook (per-project URL + event-bus listener POSTing train.* alerts). on-read evaluation (NO server sweep) - the dashboard auto-refetch + the 30s integrator heartbeat POST are the continuous read-triggers; outbound Discord pushes when operator is away from dashboard; accepted tradeoff: dead integrator + nobody watching can delay integrator_unhealthy.
decisions.design_author_defaults_accepted: (1) all 5 overrides gated on `admin` (no operator role exists - USER_ROLES=[admin,member]; pause/resume noted operator-tier, widens in 7.6); (2) force-land RECORDS operator-asserted landedSha, PM never runs git; (3) grouped-member force-land -> 409 (deferred, would break 7.3 G1); (4) audit_log append-only no updatedAt; integrator_health upsert per (project,resource), HEALTH_STALE_MS=90s (30s x3) edge-triggered via unhealthyNotified.
decisions.commit_policy: defer to campaign end (project rule: commit when asked); mirrors 7.1/7.2/7.3

completed_steps.title: Month 4 design doc
completed_steps.outcome: APPROVED after reconciling 2 director rulings + 4 reviewer-caught correctness fixes. Tables: audit_log (append-only, no updatedAt, action-centric, reason required for force_land/force_reject), integrator_health (upsert per project+resource, HEALTH_STALE_MS=90s edge-triggered via unhealthyNotified), train_state (paused/running + stuckNotified/abandonNotified debounce cols). 5 overrides all admin-gated, each writes audit row in same txn. force-land = R1 override: completes attempt passed/overridden + land side-effects (attachLandedRef) + landedSha + mandatory audit; PM RECORDS operator-asserted landedSha, NEVER runs git (PM-state and git-remote can diverge BY DESIGN; operator advances remote separately - runbook documents the manual ff). Metrics on-read: queue/in-flight counts, time-to-land p50/95/99 (resolvedAt-enqueuedAt 24h nearest-rank in JS), verify success passed/(passed+failed), abandon rate, pool util from heartbeat. RULING 1: alert delivery = BOTH SSE/dashboard banner + NEW minimal outbound Discord webhook (per-project discord_url + event-bus listener; webhooks.ts is INBOUND-only). RULING 2: on-read ONLY, no server sweep (dashboard reads + 30s heartbeat POST are the read-triggers; accepted tradeoff: dead integrator+nobody-watching delays unhealthy alert). 4 REVIEWER FIXES: (1) CRITICAL ai_agent-gate collision - shipped land/reject/startAttempt/completeAttempt ALL hard-gate actor.type===ai_agent; force-land/reject are HUMAN admin actions -> must write rows INLINE in own txn (reuse non-gated attachLandedRef) NOT delegate to the public ai_agent-gated fns; (2) force-land PM-vs-git coherence pinned (records-not-pushes is deliberate); (3) train_state missing stuckNotified/abandonNotified cols added; (4) metrics 24h window bug - SQLite datetime() string vs toISOString() lexicographically invalid -> JS-computed ISO cutoff. Authz: overrides=human admin (NOT ai_agent), heartbeat=the 1 new ai_agent endpoint, audit read=admin. §10 web arch grounded in real app (TanStack Router addChildren, use-*.ts hooks, use-sse.ts, ui/* lib). plan_revisions:1.

_step2.title: Audit-log table + service
_step2.deliverable: audit_log table + hand-authored migration 0012; audit.service (record-only + list); land/reject + group-land audit wiring; AUDIT_RECORDED event; 15 tests.
_step2.outcome: Dedicated action-centric audit. audit_log append-only (NO updatedAt), text PK, projectId/actorId FK NN, targetId NOT an FK (heterogeneous), metadataBefore/After JSON. Hand-authored 0012 (migrate() reads .sql+journal NOT broken meta snapshots; did NOT db:generate). audit.service: record(tx,...) returns id emits nothing inside txn + emitAuditRecorded after-commit helper + list (filters userId/action/targetType+targetId/from-to-window, paginated 200 cap). Local AUDIT_ACTIONS/AUDIT_TARGET_TYPES enums (Step-8 hoists to @pm/shared). ADDITIVE wiring: land()/reject() one record(tx) on PROCEED path only (idempotent-noop early-returns before txn = zero audit), after-commit emit; group landGroup/rejectGroup one audit per member. Immutability by construction (record-only, no mutator export). Executor widened 2 SSE test windows (group-land 8->12, group-reject 4->8) - per-member audit.recorded frames now in stream. DEFERRED: markInnerOrphaned orphan-reject audit -> Step 4 force-path (noted). 912 server tests, schema-test-gate green (0012 applies fresh SQLite), typecheck 6/6.

_step3.title: Integrator health channel
_step3.deliverable: integrator_health table + migration 0013; health.service (recordHeartbeat upsert + getHealth + checkStaleness edge-trigger); POST heartbeat (ai_agent) + GET health routes; TRAIN_INTEGRATOR_UNHEALTHY event; 11 tests.
_step3.outcome: Dedicated health channel (works when integrator idle, unlike lock-derived). integrator_health upsert per (project,resource) via getOrCreateLock read-then-insert idiom (NO onConflictDoUpdate in codebase). HEALTH_STALE_MS=90s (30s x3). EDGE-TRIGGER (the subtle part): checkStaleness = single-statement autocommit UPDATE of unhealthyNotified latch THEN emit train.integrator_unhealthy -> fires EXACTLY ONCE per stale episode; heartbeat upsert resets latch=false (recovery re-arm) -> re-fires on next stale. ON-READ only (no server sweep): checkStaleness called from getHealth (+ Step-5 metrics GET will reuse). Read-path-does-a-write (latch) is emit-after-write-safe. POST heartbeat = the ONE new ai_agent endpoint this phase (403 human/200 ai_agent); GET health any authed user (derived staleness_ms/healthy/never_seen). onAll auto-forwards the event (no events.ts edit). 923 server tests, schema-gate green (0013 fresh SQLite), typecheck 6/6.

_step4.title: Train state + 5 break-glass overrides
_step4.deliverable: train_state table + migration 0014; train.service (pause/resume/forceReleaseLock/forceLand/forceReject + getTrainState); routes/train.ts (admin-gated); TRAIN_PAUSED/RESUMED events; 38 tests.
_step4.outcome: HIGHEST-RISK backend step. ALL overrides write rows INLINE in own db.transaction + recordAudit in same txn + emit-after-commit; NEVER delegate to ai_agent-gated land()/reject()/startAttempt()/completeAttempt() (the design-review-caught trap - they'd 403 the human admin). Only reused helper = attachLandedRef (exported tx-internal NON-gated). VERIFIER confirmed land() does ONLY 3 durable writes (request UPDATE + attachLandedRef + audit, does NOT touch attempts - integrator does completeAttempt THEN land), so force-land completing the attempt itself is correct not a gap. force-land = R1 override: complete/synthesize attempt passed+overridden (PIN1: synthetic baseSha=landedSha, NOT NULL) + request landed+landedSha + attachLandedRef + mandatory force_land audit (reason req, after.overridden=true); records operator-asserted landedSha, NEVER runs git (PM-vs-git divergence BY DESIGN); grouped->409 (assertMemberLandableViaGroup), landed->idempotent 200 no-audit. forceReleaseLock PIN2: HARD CLEAR all 10 lock fields inline, NOT release() (would promote queue head + emit merge.lock.granted to unintended waiter), no promotion. pause/resume idempotent no-op WITHOUT duplicate audit. Authz: admin-only HUMAN (NOT ai_agent - opposite of heartbeat) at route+service; reason-required force-land/reject via z.string().min(1)+service. Contrast test: force-land lands with human admin while public land() 403s same actor. 964 server tests, schema-gate green (0014 fresh SQLite), typecheck 6/6.

_step5.title: Metrics + dashboard data API
_step5.deliverable: metrics.service (computeMetrics + getInFlight); GET train/metrics + train/in-flight added to createTrainRoutes; 15 tests. NO migration (read-only).
_step5.outcome: On-read aggregations. 24h window = JS-ISO cutoff (new Date(now-24h).toISOString()) bound as param, NEVER SQLite datetime() (reviewer-fixed lexicographic bug) - 25h-old request EXCLUDED tested. Percentile nearest-rank idx=clamp(ceil(p/100*n)-1,0,n-1) over ascending sort - exact expecteds pin off-by-one. verify_success=passed/(passed+failed) cancelled excluded; abandon=abandoned/resolved; pool_util=leased/size from heartbeat. ALL divide-by-zero guards null-not-NaN (empty data tested). health block sourced from healthService.getHealth (NOT raw read) so metrics GET FIRES train.integrator_unhealthy on stale edge ONCE (latched) - the on-read alerting reuse, tested. in-flight = integrating requests + latest attempt + groupId + forming/integrating group rows; server does NOT compute speculativePosition/batchId (dashboard enriches from SSE). SLO block reads project.settings.integrator.slo DEFENSIVELY (Step 6 adds canonical config; omits null-measured dims = no false red). Routes any-authed-user (NOT admin - observability read). 979 server tests, typecheck 6/6.

_step6.title: Per-request timeline + SLO config
_step6.deliverable: getTimeline(id) + GET merge-requests/{id}/timeline; slo + heartbeat_interval_sec in canonical project.ts + Zod-4 mirror routes/projects.ts; openapi+api-types regen; 13 tests. NO migration.
_step6.outcome: SLO config = Zod 3/4 mirror (parallelism/linked_repos pattern): slo {target_p95_time_to_land_sec, target_verify_success_rate 0-1, target_abandon_rate 0-1, all optional} + heartbeat_interval_sec (int min5 default30) in BOTH canonical (Zod3) AND routes/projects.ts LOCAL Zod-4 mirror. reject-1.5->400 test PROVES the mirror validates (would fail if mirror skipped). metrics computeSlo UNCHANGED (already defensive; now reads validated config). Timeline composes 4 sources -> events {at:ISO,kind} sorted ASCENDING (all toISOString, lexical=chronological, no SQLite datetime mix): request milestones (enqueued/pickedUp/resolved), attempts ASC (logUrl/logExcerpt/failureCategory), audit rows (land/reject/force_land/force_reject w/ actor+reason+before/after), orphan incidents (innerRequestId JS-filter, no index). force-land timeline test exercises the REAL Step-4 override. camelCase wire (merge-requests.ts convention). openapi+web api-types regenerated. 992 server + 295 shared, typecheck 6/6.

_step7.title: Webhook alerts (train.* dual SSE+Discord)
_step7.deliverable: TRAIN_STUCK + TRAIN_ABANDON_RATE_HIGH events; checkAlerts on-read in computeMetrics; alerts-listener.ts outbound Discord; webhooks.discord_url Zod 3/4 mirror; 18 tests. NO migration.
_step7.outcome: Dual delivery: SSE (onAll auto-forward) + NEW outbound Discord (webhooks.ts was INBOUND-only). ON-READ only (no sweep): checkAlerts in computeMetrics. stuck = oldest_queued_age > 600_000ms AND inFlight===0 AND state!=='paused' (PAUSED GUARD folded from verifier rec - paused train isn't stuck); abandon = ratio > 0.3 AND resolved >= 5 (min-sample guard). Edge-trigger latch (stuckNotified/abandonNotified from Step 4) via single-COLUMN UPDATE (touches ONLY latch+updatedAt, NOT pause state - tested preserved across metrics read) THEN emit (checkStaleness pattern). RESET-on-clear = boolean complement (re-fire tested). Latch helpers (readAlertLatch/setAlertLatch) exported from train.service (one write surface). Discord listener: sync-path try/catch (listeners.ts doesn't guard handler bodies) + un-awaited fetch().catch - fire-and-forget, failure swallowed, computeMetrics returns normally (tested). webhooks.discord_url in BOTH canonical + Zod-4 mirror (invalid-url->400 proves). openapi+api-types regen. 1008 server + 297 shared, typecheck 6/6. ===BACKEND CORE DONE (steps 2-7). Step 8 = shared/api-types, then 9-11 web UI.===

_step8.title: Shared schemas + API types + audit-log route
_step8.deliverable: @pm/shared audit.ts/train.ts/observability.ts (enums+views); audit.service hoist (additive re-export); NEW GET audit-log route (admin); openapi+api-types regen; 49 tests.
_step8.outcome: Canonicalization. 3 new @pm/shared schema files mirror merge-group/incident shape: audit (AUDIT_ACTIONS/AUDIT_TARGET_TYPES byte-for-byte from Step-2 local defs + auditLogSchema), train (TRAIN_STATES running|paused + trainStateSchema), observability (heartbeat/health/metricsBundle/inFlight/timeline/SLO views). audit.service HOIST = ADDITIVE: import enums from @pm/shared + RE-EXPORT for back-compat (consumers unchanged) - Step-2 audit tests green (the proof). GAP CLOSED (plan caught it): §8.4 audit-log GET (/projects/{id}/audit-log) was NEVER implemented (list() had no route) - added NEW routes/audit.ts admin-only w/ filters (userId/action/targetType/targetId/from/to/page) - Step 11 depends on this typed contract. Route Zod-4 mirrors stay LOCAL (never import @pm/shared Zod-3 into createRoute). openapi+web api-types regen (all 7.4 routes present incl audit-log). NO new MCP tools (human-facing dashboard, admin overrides, HTTP-only heartbeat). 1016 server + 338 shared, web typecheck clean, monorepo typecheck 6/6. ===BACKEND COMPLETE (steps 2-8). Steps 9-11 = WEB UI (dashboard/timeline/audit+controls), 12 integrator, 13 E2E, 14 docs.===

_step9.title: Web: Train dashboard page
_step9.deliverable: WEB TEST HARNESS stood up (vitest+testing-library+jsdom) + train-dashboard-page.tsx + use-train.ts hooks + use-sse wiring + format helpers + route/sidebar; 20 tests.
_step9.outcome: First web UI step. DECISION: stood up the web test harness from scratch (web pkg had NO test runner - vitest/testing-library/jsdom + test script + vitest.config + setup; reusable for Steps 10/11; turbo picks it up). Mirrors actual app: trainKeys keyed-factory (use-projects pattern), useTrainMetrics/InFlight/Health/State (refetchInterval 10s for live freshness), read-only GETs via apiFetch. use-sse ADDITIVE: case train/merge -> [trainKeys.all] + 12 event types + train.* -> toast.warning; NO 2nd useSSE (global in app-layout) - pinned by pure-fn getInvalidationKeys test. NULL-SAFE format helpers (formatDurationMs/Percent/Freshness -> '—' not NaN - the bug class, tested via null fixture). Dashboard: 6 metric cards + health freshness (1s setInterval tick between 10s refetches, grey/red when unhealthy) + in-flight table (grouped by group_id) + SLO chips ('No SLO set' for null). projectTrainRoute /train + Train sidebar nav. 20 web tests, web typecheck clean vs api-types, vite build green. Harness friction: jest-dom /vitest augmentation needs @vitest/expect direct dep. NOTE: pre-existing @pm/integrator-ref git-worktree integration test failure (Phase 7.1, UNTOUCHED by 7.4 - transient flake seen in Step 12 too; Step 13 to confirm, NOT a 7.4 regression).

_step10.title: Web: Per-request timeline view
_step10.deliverable: merge-request-timeline-page.tsx + getMergeRequestTimeline + useMergeRequestTimeline; /merge-requests/{id}/timeline route; dashboard in-flight->timeline link; 9 tests.
_step10.outcome: Timeline consumes Step-6 GET /merge-requests/{id}/timeline. useMergeRequestTimeline keyed UNDER trainKeys.all -> shipped useSSE merge.*/train.* invalidation auto-refetches live (no new SSE wiring). Vertical timeline (<ol> connector + per-kind node icon) renders ALL event kinds in backend ascending order: queued/integrating milestones, attempt entries (attemptNumber + status Badge + failureCategory + logUrl external <a> / logExcerpt <details> fallback + base/tree SHAs), audit entries (force_land/force_reject = red Override badge + 'by <actor> - reason: <reason>' = the accountability surfaced), incident (orphaned_inner orphanedSha/state/resolution), terminal landed/rejected/abandoned. NULL-SAFE (missing attemptNumber->'Attempt —', missing logUrl/SHA->graceful - tested no NaN leak). Top-level route /merge-requests/$requestId/timeline (requests addressed by id not project-scoped, mirrors taskDetailRoute). Dashboard in-flight member id -> Link to timeline. 30 web tests, typecheck clean vs api-types, build green.

_step11.title: Web: Audit view + break-glass controls
_step11.deliverable: train-audit-page.tsx (admin-gated audit table + break-glass controls); lib/api 6 fns; use-train 5 mutation hooks + useAuditLog; audit.recorded SSE; /train/audit route; 8 tests.
_step11.outcome: Last web step - human R1-override surface. VERIFIER confirmed all 6 checks: apiFetch throws ApiError whose .message carries backend AppError message (failed override surfaces readably not [object Object]); per-role gate mirrors users-page admin-gate (DEFENSE-IN-DEPTH, backend 403 is real gate); force-land friction matches contract; mutation pattern matches useUpdateTask. 5 mutation hooks (first web mutations this phase) mirror useUpdateTask: onSuccess invalidate trainKeys.all + toast.success, onError toast.error(err.message). FORCE-LAND dialog: admin-only + reason Textarea + landedSha Input + prominent red ShieldAlert warning ('bypasses verify gate, advances main past unverified tree, recorded in audit log') + submit DISABLED until reason+landedSha+requestId all non-empty + two-step (button->Dialog->submit). force-reject reason-required. Per-role: admin sees force-*, member 'Access Denied' (both tested). audit table override rows amber/red highlighted. Action enum LOCAL `as const satisfies readonly AuditLogEntry['action'][]` (drift caught at typecheck - verifier fold). audit.recorded SSE -> trainKeys.all. pause/resume reflect+toggle trainState. 39 web tests, typecheck clean vs api-types, build green, monorepo typecheck 6/6. ===WEB UI COMPLETE (steps 9-11). Step 12 integrator heartbeat+pause, 13 E2E, 14 docs.===

_step12.title: Integrator heartbeat + honor pause
_step12.deliverable: pm-client postHeartbeat+getTrainState; config heartbeatIntervalSec; batch.ts isPaused gate (3 sites) + inFlight counters; index.ts heartbeat setInterval+boot beat+version+clearInterval; heartbeat.ts pure builder; 14 tests.
_step12.outcome: Integrator-only (Steps 3/4/6 shipped PM endpoints). PAUSE = read-side gate (poll = correctness floor, SSE latency hint), FAIL-OPEN (getTrainState throws -> running; lock+PM-transitions+force-* are the hard safety). NO-ABORT invariant PROVEN: pause gates ONLY the admission edge - top-of-pass before acquireLock (paused->idle no lock/pickup) + per-PASS (not per-member) gate at inner admit for(;;) top (paused -> pool.release+break = stop NEW admission, outer drain/tryLand/Promise.race/finally-releaseLock ALL still run). Critical test: train paused mid-drain -> already-integrating member LANDS, 2nd queued NEVER picked up, lock released on drain. Group: formingToIntegrate=paused?undefined:forming suppresses forming group BUT openIncidentCount still drives lock -> RECOVERY STILL RUNS while paused (recoverOrphanedInner reached, forming group not integrated). inFlight {requests,batches,groups} counters on BatchDeps, reset in FINALLY (status can't stick integrating - throws-mid-drain tested). Heartbeat: buildHeartbeat (pure, in heartbeat.ts for testability) snake_case status/pool_utilization{size,leased}/in_flight/version, status=integrating iff batches>0||groups>0; emitHeartbeat fire-and-forget .catch; boot beat after pool.ensureAll + setInterval(heartbeatIntervalSec).unref + clearInterval on shutdown. version from Commander. 146 integrator pass/1 skip (no-git guard), typecheck 6/6.

_step13.title: Full-stack E2E + de-flake
_step13.deliverable: observability-e2e.test.ts (5 flows); group-e2e flow-(d) de-flake; 151 integrator pass/1 skip. NO src changes.
_step13.outcome: Regression net mirroring 7.2/7.3 harness (in-process PM + spawned dist/index.js). 5 flows: (a) heartbeat->fresh->kill->back-date lastSeenAt 91s (BOUNDED - HEALTH_STALE_MS is FIXED 90s, no real wait)->stale: healthy false + staleness>90k + edge fired DB latch unhealthyNotified=true (hard floor) + SSE train.integrator_unhealthy (soft belt); (b) pause->req2 STAYS queued bounded ~8s window (>=5 poll cycles, not 1 read)->resume->lands (no-abort proven E2E); (c) force-land (integrating via direct-DB seed, no integrator race)->landed+landedSha + synthesized attempt failureReason 'force_land override' + exactly-1 force_land audit row; (d) metrics exact integer asserts over seed (EXECUTOR FIX: verify_success_rate computed over merge_attempts not request resolution -> seed inserts passed/failed attempts; no assertion weakened); (e) force-release hard-clears lock (holderId/acquiredAt/expiresAt null) + priorHolderId + force_release_lock audit. PRE-EXISTING FLAKE ROOT-CAUSED+FIXED (the one flagged Steps 9/12): NOT integration.test.ts (passes 5/5) - it's group-e2e flow(d) un-reconcilable-orphan, incident-visible-before-group-partially_landed-transition-commits race under CPU contention -> bounded poll-until (green 3x). admin-with-token inserted inline (bcryptjs apiTokenHash - createTestUser doesn't set token). FULL MONOREPO pnpm test 10/10 turbo tasks green (338 server... wait shared=1016/server... all green), typecheck 6/6.

_step14.title: Documentation
_step14.deliverable: integrator-deployment.md §15 observability+break-glass; design §14 deviations + Shipped status; CLAUDE.md 7.4 para; integrator README heartbeat+pause; vision marked shipped.
_step14.outcome: Docs-only, cross-checked vs shipped source: config keys (heartbeat_interval_sec, slo.*, webhooks.discord_url), tables (audit_log/integrator_health/train_state), events (train.paused/resumed/stuck/abandon_rate_high/integrator_unhealthy + audit.recorded), endpoints (integrator/heartbeat|health, train/metrics|in-flight|state|pause|resume, merge-locks/{resource}/force-release, merge-requests/{id}/force-land|force-reject|timeline, audit-log), force-land R1-override semantics, dual SSE+Discord on-read alerts, pause - all verified. §14 deviations (11): ai_agent-gate-collision avoidance, NEW outbound Discord, on-read no-sweep, metrics JS-ISO cutoff, 3 edge-trigger latches, paused-not-stuck guard, fail-open pause, HEALTH_STALE_MS fixed 90s (heartbeat_interval drives integrator cadence not PM staleness - explicit deferral, code-commented, NOT a bug), web harness Step 9, group-e2e flake root-caused Step 13, force-release hard-clear. typecheck 6/6, 1016 server tests green. No shipped-vs-design contradiction.

final_gate.tests: 1650 passed / 1 skipped (338 shared + 106 mcp + 1016 server + 151 integrator-ref/1 skip + 39 web). pnpm test 10/10 turbo tasks EXIT=0
final_gate.lint: touched files clean; ~pre-existing server + web baseline in untouched files unchanged
final_gate.commit_note: Left dirty for human review per project CLAUDE.md 'commit only when asked'. Whole 7.4 surface uncommitted on top of the 7.3 commit 80807a6 (branch phase-7.2-speculative-batching).

open_issues: Deferred: heartbeat_interval_sec drives the integrator's beat cadence but NOT PM's HEALTH_STALE_MS (fixed 90s) - documented in design §14, a future polish not a bug.
Pre-existing server + web lint baseline in untouched files (predates 7.4).
First web test harness stood up in Step 9 (vitest+testing-library+jsdom) - reusable for future web work.

First mostly-web-UI phase (different shape from backend-heavy 7.1-7.3). Riskiest backend = force-land (deliberate audited R1 override). Riskiest integration = pause semantics (stop new pickups, finish in-flight).
Existing primitives to build on: web app (pages/components/hooks/router/stores/TanStack), webhooks.ts (Discord), activity_log table, the SSE stream, the lane-lock heartbeat.

Recurring hazards: Zod3/4 (LOCAL Zod-4 mirror in server routes); drizzle-kit snapshot chain broken -> HAND-AUTHOR migrations (no db:generate); win32 test cmds; integrator-ref fileParallelism:false; ~pre-existing server lint baseline; regen web api-types (generate:api) + openapi after route changes.
